description: Style NoteCrafted from soft cotton and designed with a cut that offers a flattering silhouette, these chinos from highlander make for a great addition to your semi-formal wardrobe. Pair them with a semi-formal shirt, throw over a blazer and slip into suede shoes.Product DetailsKhaki trousers with two pockets on the sides with a coin pocket in the right side pocket, two pockets on the back, comfortable waistband with belt loops at waist and a zipper and button closure on the frontMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash at 40 degreesWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachTumble dry normal or line dryWarm ironSize and FitThe model (height 6â€™ and waist 32â€�) is wearing a size 32
